description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Ma Tau Wai Road and Man Yue Street

2023-06-25T22:00:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to emergency repair of road surface, the slow lane of Ma Tau Wai Road (Hung Hom bound) and the slow lane of Man Yue Street (Ho Man Tin bound) are closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.   Motorists are advised to drive with utmost care and patience. Members of the public are advised to pay attention to radio / TV announcements on the latest traffic conditions.
2023-06-25T22:00:00.CONTENT_CN:
因緊急路面維修，馬頭圍道(往紅磡方向)的慢線及民裕街(往何文田方向)的慢線現已封閉。
駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  駕駛人士請盡量忍讓。市民請留意電台/電視廣播的最新交通情況。

2023-06-26T06:00:00.CONTENT_EN: The slow lane of Ma Tau Wai Road (Hung Hom bound) and the slow lane of Man Yue Street (Ho Man Tin bound) which were closed due to emergency repair of road surface are re-opened to all traffic.
2023-06-26T06:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因緊急路面維修而封閉的馬頭圍道(往紅磡方向)的慢線及民裕街(往何文田方向)的慢線現已解封。

2023-06-26T06:06:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to road subsidence , part of the lanes of Hoi Wang Road (Jordan Road bound) near Man Cheong Street Rest Garden are closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lane is available to motorists.   Traffic is busy now.
2023-06-26T06:06:00.CONTENT_CN:
因路面下陷，海泓道(往佐敦道方向)近文昌街休憩花園的部份行車線現已封閉。
駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2023-06-26T06:41:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Tuen Mun Road (Kowloon bound) near Ting Kau is closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.   Traffic is busy now.
2023-06-26T06:41:00.CONTENT_CN:
因交通意外，屯門公路(往九龍方向)近汀九的部份行車線現已封閉。
駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2023-06-26T07:38:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Tuen Mun Road (Kowloon bound) near Ting Kau which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2023-06-26T07:38:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的屯門公路(往九龍方向)近汀九的部份行車線現已解封。

2023-06-26T06:43:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Tolo Highway (Kowloon bound) near Hong Kong Science Park is closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lane is available to motorists.   Traffic is busy now.
2023-06-26T06:43:00.CONTENT_CN:
因交通意外，吐露港公路(往九龍方向)近香港科學園的部份行車線現已封閉。
駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2023-06-26T07:02:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Tolo Highway (Kowloon bound) near Hong Kong Science Park is still being closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.   Traffic queue on Tolo Highway (Kowloon bound) ends near Tai Po Kau Lo Wai.   Traffic is congested now.
2023-06-26T07:02:00.CONTENT_CN:
因交通意外，吐露港公路(往九龍方向)近香港科學園的部份行車線仍然封閉。
駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  現時在吐露港公路(往九龍方向)的車龍龍尾已到近大埔滘老圍。  現時上址交通擠塞。

2023-06-26T07:33:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Tolo Highway (Kowloon bound) near Hong Kong Science Park is still being closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lane is available to motorists.   Traffic queue on Tolo Highway (Kowloon bound) ends near Tai Po Kau Lo Wai.   Citizens heading to Kowloon area from Tai Po, Fanling and Sheung Shui please consider using MTR services.   Traffic is congested now.
2023-06-26T07:33:00.CONTENT_CN:
因交通意外，吐露港公路(往九龍方向)近香港科學園的部份行車線仍然封閉。
駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  現時在吐露港公路(往九龍方向)的車龍龍尾已到近大埔滘老圍。  由大埔、粉嶺及上水前往九龍一帶的市民，請考慮使用港鐵服務。  現時上址交通擠塞。

2023-06-26T07:42:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Tolo Highway (Kowloon bound) near Hong Kong Science Park which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic. Traffic queue takes time to disperse.
2023-06-26T07:42:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的吐露港公路(往九龍方向)近香港科學園的部份行車線現已解封。車龍有待消散。

2023-06-26T06:59:00.CONTENT_EN:

2023-06-28T16:48:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to vehicle on fire , the tunnel tube slow lane of Western Harbour Crossing (Kowloon bound) is closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.   Traffic is busy now.
2023-06-28T16:48:00.CONTENT_CN:
因車輛着火，西區海底隧道(往九龍方向)的管道慢線現已封閉。
駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2023-06-28T16:49:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to vehicle on fire , tunnel tube of Western Harbour Crossing (Kowloon bound) is closed to all traffic.   Traffic is busy now.
2023-06-28T16:49:00.CONTENT_CN: 因車輛着火，西區海底隧道(往九龍方向)的管道現已封閉。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2023-06-28T16:54:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to vehicle on fire , tunnel tube of Western Harbour Crossing (Kowloon bound) is still being closed to all traffic.   Motorists heading to Kowloon please use alternative tunnels.   Traffic is busy now.
2023-06-28T16:54:00.CONTENT_CN: 因車輛着火，西區海底隧道(往九龍方向)的管道仍然封閉。  前往九龍的駕駛人士請改用其他隧道。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2023-06-28T17:02:00.CONTENT_EN:
Tunnel tube fast and middle lanes of Western Harbour Crossing (Kowloon bound) which were closed due to vehicle on fire are re-opened to all traffic;
while the tunnel tube slow lane of Western Harbour Crossing (Kowloon bound) is still closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are still available to motorists.   Traffic is busy now.
2023-06-28T17:02:00.CONTENT_CN:
較早前因車輛着火而封閉的西區海底隧道(往九龍方向)的管道快線及中線現已解封;
而西區海底隧道(往九龍方向)的管道慢線仍然封閉。駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2023-06-28T17:13:00.CONTENT_EN:
Tunnel tube fast and middle lanes of Western Harbour Crossing (Kowloon bound) which was closed due to vehicle on fire is re-opened to all traffic;
the tunnel tube slow lane of Western Harbour Crossing (Kowloon bound) is still closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are still available to motorists.   Traffic queue on Western Harbour Crossing (Kowloon bound) ends at Connaught Road Central flyover near Harbour Building.   Traffic is congested now.
2023-06-28T17:13:00.CONTENT_CN:
較早前因車輛着火而封閉的西區海底隧道(往九龍方向)的管道快線及中線現已解封;
西區海底隧道(往九龍方向)的管道慢線仍然封閉。駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  現時在西區海底隧道(往九龍方向)的車龍龍尾已到干諾道中天橋近海港政府大樓。  現時上址交通擠塞。

2023-06-28T17:27:00.CONTENT_EN: The tunnel tube slow lane of Western Harbour Crossing (Kowloon bound) which was closed due to vehicle on fire is re-opened to all traffic. Traffic queue takes time to disperse.
2023-06-28T17:27:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因車輛着火而封閉的西區海底隧道(往九龍方向)的管道慢線現已解封。車龍有待消散。
